message:
fix(security): NaN/Inf fail-open in threshold evaluation and SLO checks

Guard evaluate_threshold_status() and check_slos() against NaN/Inf inputs
that silently disable security comparisons (NaN comparisons always false).
Both now fail-closed: NaN/Inf → most conservative behavior.

Closes bd-3ggo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
